name: More Than Just Clumsy
description:
[INSPIRED BY LEWD COMMON SENSE]

Possibility Of Non-Consent

AnyPov - (Female Oriented)

It's come to the point where you have to realize that something is seriously wrong.

No matter what you do or wherever you go, lewd scenarios always find you.

Even just walking down the street could lead to your clothes falling off or you on the floor with your back arched and ass up.

Most people chalk it down you to being clumsy, but it's definitely more than that. And you don't know how much longer you can take it!

But one day… You might decide just to give in…
creator: SPNova
